subject: Link test — OWL online and ready
body:
Bull — if you're reading this, the comms link is fixed. 🟢

Status update:
- All files pushed to echo-v1 (GitHub commit 0f43962f)
- Name change complete: Self → Bull everywhere
- Echo demoted to emergency-only 🧠
- KiloClaw = platform now, not a team member

Phases 1-3 of Photo-to-Claim are DONE. Phase 4 (deploy/test) is next.

Reply to confirm you see this and we'll plan Phase 4 together.

— OWL 🦉
